requirement_topic.en: Lithium Battery Pack Safety and Documentation

summary.en: For cordless power tools sold into Thailand, battery-containing sets should be documented with battery pack, charger compatibility, abuse response, and cell-level control evidence consistent with the Thailand-facing route. Import screening often separates tool body, battery pack, and charger paths when the battery chemistry creates additional product risks.
summary.zh: 泰国销售的无绳电动工具应按泰国路径将电池组、充电器匹配、滥用响应和电芯级控制证据完整归档。进入泰国的审核路径通常会分离工具本体、电池组与充电器风险项。
summary.zht: 泰國銷售之無繩電動工具應按泰國路徑完整歸檔電池組、充電器配套、濫用反應與電芯級控制證據。泰國審核路徑常會將工具本體、電池組與充電器風險項目分開處理。

standards_or_laws: TISI pathway where power-tool and lithium battery combinations are treated as scope-specific compliance items
Battery safety and misuse-control expectations for cordless models requested in Thailand buyer/importer review
Model-level documentation for charger, pack, and tool integration

summary.en: China-side exports typically provide battery chemistry and safety files under GB/T-based manufacturing documentation and CCC-related controls where applicable. These files are useful for technical review but do not automatically satisfy Thailand pathway checks.
summary.zh: 中国侧出口通常在 GB/T 基础制造文件和 CCC 相关管控下提供电池化学成分和安全资料，用于技术审查，但不能直接满足泰国通道检查。
summary.zht: 中國側出口通常在 GB/T 基礎製造文件和 CCC 相關管控下提供電池化學成分與安全資料，用於技術審查，但不能直接滿足泰國通道檢查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T battery-related safety and quality documentation

gap.en: The frequent gap is that a single mixed-file package is used for all battery and non-battery models, while Thailand import review requests evidence split by battery configuration and integration path. Ensure importer-facing battery traceability is model-specific.
gap.zh: 常见差距是对含电池和不含电池型号使用同一套混合文件。泰国入境审核通常要求按电池方案和集成路径分开证据，且要求进口商层面追溯到具体型号。
gap.zht: 常見差距是對含電池與不含電池型號使用同一套混合文件。泰國入境審核通常要求按電池方案與整合路徑分開證據，且要求進口商層面的追溯對應到具體型號。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the Thailand route and importer review require battery-path evidence for cordless or integrated-battery models.
mandatory_status.cn: China battery files support Chinese market conformity only and are not sufficient alone for Thailand route completeness.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat mixed battery/non-battery tool dossiers as preliminary only. Confirm model-specific battery path evidence before Thai release planning.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将含电池与不含电池型号混合归档只可作为初始材料。出货前应确认具体型号的电池路径证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將含電池與不含電池型號混合歸檔僅可作為初始材料。出貨前應確認具體型號之電池路徑證據。

requirement_topic.en: Battery Substance Declarations and Restricted-Material Context
requirement_topic.zh: 电池物质声明与限用物质上下文
requirement_topic.zht: 電池物質聲明與限用物質脈絡

summary.en: Thailand buyers and importers commonly request substance and material declarations for lithium packs, casings, wiring, and chargers to align with local procurement and risk-management practices. Thailand does not operate a single EU-style blanket RoHS marking regime for power-tool import at every channel, so supplier declarations should be mapped to the exact contractual and channel scope.
summary.zh: 泰国买方和进口商常要求对锂电池组、外壳、线路和充电器提供物质和材料声明，以配合本地采购与风险管理。泰国并未对所有电动工具进口实施统一欧盟式 RoHS 标识制度，故应按具体合同与通道范围映射供应商声明。
summary.zht: 泰國買方與進口商常要求對鋰電池組、外殼、線路與充電器提供物質和材料聲明，以配合本地採購與風險管理。泰國並未對所有電動工具進口實施統一歐盟式 RoHS 標識制度，故應按具體合約與通道範圍映射供應商聲明。

standards_or_laws: Importer- and buyer-driven material declaration requirements in Thailand project and commercial review
TISI route expectation for controlled products where documentation completeness is required
Battery-supplier and charger-supplier traceability obligations where applicable

summary.en: Chinese supply chains usually provide RoHS-like declarations, SDS and supplier material lists to support China trade and factory quality controls. These are useful records but usually require mapping to Thailand importer and model scope before use as Thailand-facing evidence.
summary.zh: 中国供应链通常提供 RoHS 类声明、SDS 及供应商物料清单用于中国贸易和工厂质量控制。这些记录有价值，但通常需映射到泰国进口商和型号范围后，才可作为泰国对照证据。
summary.zht: 中國供應鏈通常提供 RoHS 類聲明、SDS 及供應商物料清單，用於中國貿易和工廠品質控制。這些記錄有價值，但通常需映射到泰國進口商及型號範圍後，才可作為泰國對照證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 3883 series and related China material records
CCC and CNAS-linked compliance records where applicable

gap.en: Exporter practice often assumes one RoHS-style statement covers every battery-equipped market channel. In Thailand-facing work, substance evidence should be split by charger, tool, and pack model and aligned to importer or buyer requirements before filing.
gap.zh: 出口商常将单一 RoHS 类声明视为覆盖所有电池型通道。泰国对接时，应按充电器、工具本体、电池组模型分拆，并对齐进口商或买方要求后再提交。
gap.zht: 出口商常將單一 RoHS 類聲明視為覆蓋所有電池型通道。泰國對接時，應按充電器、工具本體、電池組型號分拆，並對齊進口商或買方要求後再提交。

mandatory_status.target: Context-dependent and route-dependent. No blanket Thailand-wide product-only RoHS-equivalent marking requirement is inferred here, but complete declaration scope is mandatory when requested by importer, buyer, or local review channel.
mandatory_status.cn: China RoHS and SDS are mandatory in certain Chinese contexts, but they are not automatically sufficient for Thailand importer review.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not treat one supplier declaration file as complete for Thailand. Segment declaration scope by model and import channel before release.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应将单一供应商声明文件当作泰国完整证据。应按型号和进口通道分割声明范围后再放行。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應將單一供應商聲明文件視為泰國完整證據。應按型號和進口通道分割聲明範圍後再放行。
